title: Memories: Collective Edition
description: A modpack focusing on giving you a vast amount of content to your Minecraft experience with thorough and reasonable optimizations, giving you a speedy experience!
body:
# Welcome to M:CE!

Or, Memories: Collective Edition

## What are we in for?

Memories: Collective Edition focuses and aims to bring a mix of vanilla-friendly and unique content while also focusing on optimizing your experience effectively, and properly, serving you minimal issues with lag.

[Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) takes part of this modpack, added via Modrinth.

M:CE is also a very animation-based modpack, you can change certain animation packs as you'd like.

## Please note!
Keybinds are pre-edited, mostly to remove conflicting binds, you may change this as needed.

Understand that this modpack is early, and things can be **bound** to change, with revamps and fixes to bugs, as well as removal of some mods.

Thank you for reading!
